goal: Build a parcel-singulation-from-heap station: 5 cubes pile in a heap zone, robot picks them one at a time and places in bin. First user of create_heap_zone. Realizes #8 Parcel Singulation + Sort infrastructure.
thoughts:
Six heap-singulation specifics for CP-57:
1) Heap zone /World/CubeHeap at center [0.4, 0.3, 0.835], radius 0.10m, 5 items.
2) create_heap_zone spawns 5 cubes via golden-angle radial spread. They pile after physics settles.
3) Robot picks topmost-by-reach cube. controller's _next_cube selects closest-within-reach.
4) Bin behind robot at [0, -0.4, 0.75].
5) Heap items have rubber friction + sleepThreshold=0 (CP-01 pattern).
6) Industrial use: bin-picking from a heap of mixed items. Realizes infrastructure for #8.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Heap of 5 cubes
create_heap_zone(
    heap_path="/World/CubeHeap",
    center=[0.4, 0.3, 0.835],
    radius=0.10,
    n_items=5,
    item_size=0.05,
)

# Stationary work surface under heap (verifier needs bridge)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/HeapSurface",
    position=[0.4, 0.3, 0.78],
    size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/CubeHeap/Item_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/CubeHeap/Item_{i+1}" for i in range(5)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.3, 0.85], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/HeapSurface",
    source_paths=[f"/World/CubeHeap/Item_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/HeapSurface", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-57 demonstrates heap-singulation. CP-31 was vertical pile; CP-57 is xy-spread heap. Realizes infrastructure for #8 Parcel Singulation + Sort. Full scenario also needs add_vision_classifier_gate for downstream sorting (CP-33+ patterns) — combine for full pipeline.
failure_modes: Heap items spawn at z=0.86 (just above HeapSurface); they fall and settle in physics. After settle, positions slightly drift from spawn xy.
5 items in 0.10m radius — overlap. Goldenrod-angle spread minimizes; but tight packing may stack on top of each other.
Sensor zone covers most heap (radius 0.05, heap radius 0.10) — only items within sensor xy will trigger. Smaller sensor + per-cube reach selection picks any in range.
verified_status: draft; passes=4 n=16 wilson_lower=0.1018; was form-gate-pending; demoted 2026-05-15
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# Heap of items
create_heap_zone(
    heap_path={{heap_zone.path}},
    center={{heap_zone.center}},
    radius={{heap_zone.radius}},
    n_items={{heap_zone.n_items}},
    item_size={{heap_zone.item_size}},
)

# Stationary work surface under heap (verifier needs bridge)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{heap_surface.path}},
    position={{heap_surface.position}},
    size={{heap_surface.size}},
    surface_velocity={{heap_surface.surface_velocity}},
)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/CubeHeap/Item_1", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_2", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_3", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_4", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_5"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in ["/World/CubeHeap/Item_1", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_2", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_3", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_4", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_5"]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{output_bin.path}}, position={{output_bin.position}}, size={{output_bin.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{heap_surface.path}},
    source_paths=["/World/CubeHeap/Item_1", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_2", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_3", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_4", "/World/CubeHeap/Item_5"],
    destination_path={{output_bin.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{heap_surface.path}}, {{output_bin.path}}],
)
